description: Canonical free graveyard-hate artifact pair — the two colorless cheap-or-free graveyard exile artifacts that compete for the same Legacy/Modern/Pauper/Commander sideboard slot. Tormod's Crypt (0-mana, sac-to-exile-one-player) is the elder; Relic of Progenitus (1-mana, tap-incremental OR sac-all-plus-cantrip) is the cantrip-replacement upgrade. Each card's own pre-existing Related-cards list already named the other, so the substrate was already there in both nodes' trivia — Connections just makes it traversable.
citations: [Scryfall: Relic of Progenitus oracle_text, mana_cost, legalities]
[MTGGoldfish: Brewer's Minute — Building a Modern Sideboard — Graveyard Hate]
[TCGPlayer: What Kind of Graveyard Hate Should You Run in Pauper MTG]

other_candidates_considered.reason: Sarkhan Vol is the flavor-text speaker on Act of Treason (not the depicted figure), and Sarkhan's Catharsis is canonically Sarkhan's anti-Bolas spell. Real but oblique — flavor-attribution edges are weaker than mechanical-cohort or direct-depiction edges. If a Sarkhan character node were ever commissioned (currently the corpus has only these two SV-touching cards, below the 3-anchor threshold), this would auto-attach via Protocol 2 frontmatter, making a 1:1 edge here premature.

Vastwood Gorger is from the Vastwood (Zendikar/Ondu); Frantic Strength's trivia merely references Vines of Vastwood as the genre-defining green combat-trick. The connection is mediated by a third card we don't own. Place-name overlap is not an edge.

Whispersilk Cloak's nearest corpus mates would be Swiftfoot Boots / Lightning Greaves / Invisible Stalker (none in corpus per grep). Titanic Growth's nearest would be Giant Growth / Vines of Vastwood / Might of Old Krosa (none in corpus). Both are singleton-reprint commons-tier staples with no current corpus partner.

next_pass_suggestions: Watch for a third graveyard-hate artifact entering the corpus (Leyline of the Void, Soul-Guide Lantern, Nihil Spellbomb, Soul Warden's Journal); at N>=3 the mr-nodeley-eligible candidate is a 'free graveyard hate' or 'colorless sideboard staple' cohort/symbol node, anchored by Tormod + Relic + the third entrant.

Sarkhan-Vol character node staged — currently 2 anchors (Sarkhan's Catharsis as depiction; Act of Treason as flavor-speaker), below the 3-anchor threshold. Trigger condition: a third Sarkhan-touching card enters the corpus.
